exploration_notes: Traced the complete Django ORM query compilation pipeline across 18 source files. The pipeline has three phases: (1) lazy construction via Manager→QuerySet→Query.add_q()→WhereNode tree of Lookups; (2) compilation via Query.get_compiler()→SQLCompiler.as_sql()→compile(node) with as_{vendor}() vendor dispatch; (3) execution via execute_sql()→cursor.execute(). The architecture uses the Composite pattern (WhereNode/Q trees), Lazy Builder (QuerySet cloning), Strategy/dispatch (as_{vendor}() on every e
